parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ats_evaluations (user_id, resume_id, job_id, overall_score, skill_match_score, experience_match_score, semantic_match_score, gap_analysis, recommendations)
VALUES ($1, $2, (SELECT job_id FROM jobs WHERE dedup_hash = $3 LIMIT 1), $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, $9)
ON CONFLICT (resume_id, job_id) DO UPDATE SET 
  overall_score = EXCLUDED.overall_score,
  skill_match_score = EXCLUDED.skill_match_score,
  semantic_match_score = EXCLUDED.semantic_match_score,
  gap_analysis = EXCLUDED.gap_analysis,
  recommendations = EXCLUDED.recommendations;
